sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 266445, "Big Chico Creek", Stream, CA, Butte Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":266445,"gaz_name":"Big Chico Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA"} — first point of the multipoint geometry converts to lon -121.93527, lat 39.70767 at the confluence with the Sacramento River near Chico, correcting the file's prior coordinate (-121.7524, 39.7779), a mid-reach point roughly 16km east of the creek's actual mouth.

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(14) — Big Chico Creek (Butte Co.)
sources.quotedText: (14) Big Chico Creek (Butte Co.). (A) From mouth to Bear Hole, located approximately one mile downstream from the upper end of Bidwell Park. Jun. 16 through Feb. 15. (B) From Bear Hole to the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve. Nov. 1 through Apr. 30. (C) From the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve to Higgins Hole Falls, located about 1/2 mile upstream from Ponderosa Way. Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve — The Big Chico Creek Watershed (Chico State)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open June 16 through February 15, from the mouth to Bear Hole
regulations.verbatimText: From mouth to Bear Hole, located approximately one mile downstream from the upper end of Bidwell Park. Jun. 16 through Feb. 15.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from Oct. 16 through Feb. 15; no such gear restriction stated for Jun. 16–Oct. 15.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from Oct. 16 through Feb. 15, from the mouth to Bear Hole
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from Oct. 16 through Feb. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession. Limit applies to hatchery (adipose fin-clipped) fish only.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, from the mouth to Bear Hole
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: Open November 1 through April 30, from Bear Hole to the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve
regulations.verbatimText: From Bear Hole to the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve. Nov. 1 through Apr. 30.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used throughout the open season.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used, from Bear Hole to the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession. Limit applies to hatchery (adipose fin-clipped) fish only.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, from Bear Hole to the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Closed to all fishing all year, from the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve to Higgins Hole Falls.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year, from the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve to Higgins Hole Falls
regulations.verbatimText: From the upper boundary of the Big Chico Creek Ecological Reserve to Higgins Hole Falls, located about 1/2 mile upstream from Ponderosa Way. Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
